category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes tftp-now as a TFTP server and client.
source_facts.description says it is a single-binary TFTP server and client.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title uses puhitaku/tftp-now.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo both point to the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/puhitaku/tftp-now, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names TFTP server and client behavior.
source_facts.executables lists tftp-now as a command-line executable.
